input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_encrypt_config_for_create (id int not null, certificate_number int(10) unsigned not null, password varchar(255) not null default '', amount int(10) not null, primary key (`id`))

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_encrypt_config_for_create (id int not null, cipher_certificate_number varchar(100) not null default '', assisted_query_certificate_number varchar(200) not null, plain_certificate_number integer(10) unsigned, cipher_password varchar(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password varchar(255) NOT NULL, plain_password varchar(255) not null default '', cipher_amount VARCHAR(4000), plain_amount int(10) not null, primary key (`id`))
